message:
refactor(conformance): box ConformanceViolation in error returns to reduce stack frame sizes

ConformanceViolation is a large enum (contains String fields, Duration,
Box<ViolationEvidence>, nested expectations). Returning it by value in
Result<_, ConformanceViolation> inflated every call frame across the
conformance monitor and oracle APIs.

Change all public and internal error returns to Box<ConformanceViolation>:
- observe(), observe_at(), observe_with_cx()
- check_timeout(), check_lab()
- ConformanceOracle wrapper methods

Each construction site now wraps in Box::new(). The oracle's violation
collection clones via (*violation).clone() since it stores unboxed
violations in its Vec for later inspection.

Test assertions updated to use err.as_ref() for pattern matching and
reference comparisons against expected values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
